channel.title: Color Number Match — Release Notes
channel.description: Version history and release notes for Color Number Match, a vibrant iOS puzzle game by Ziyad Alsuhaymi.

item.title: v1.2 — Engagement Update
item.dc:creator: Ziyad Alsuhaymi
item.description:
The Engagement Update focuses on polish, monetization, and depth.

Added

  • Special Tiles — Bomb, Rainbow, and Frozen variants woven into level generation.
  • Metal shader effects — dissolve, ripple, shimmer, combo glow, frosted glass, rainbow cycle (with graceful fallback).
  • CoreHaptics manager with bespoke patterns for every game event.
  • Watch Ad for +3 Moves — opt-in rewarded ad before game over.
  • Push notifications — daily challenge, streak reminder, lives-full, inactivity.
  • 20 Game Center achievements.
  • Expanded palette: 4 new colors (Indigo, Mint, Brown, Coral) and numbers up to 9.
  • Smart rating prompt with 30-day cooldown.
  • Interactive onboarding covering special tiles.
  • iPad optimization: two-column layout, 4-column home navigation, sidebar-detail settings.
  • ProMotion 120Hz support.
  • Fastlane automation for screenshots and builds.

Changed

  • Localization grew from 7 to 24 languages.
  • Level balance refined; beginner pack preserved.
  • Score display uses spring-animated pop above matched tiles.
  • Sound and haptic logic split into dedicated managers.

Fixed

  • Free-reward timer edge cases on app resume.
  • Tile gradient rendering on older iOS versions.
  • Rare crash in high-streak combo calculation.

item.title: v1.1
item.dc:creator: Ziyad Alsuhaymi
item.description:
Monetization and polish release.

  • Dark and light mode support.
  • Background music system.
  • Daily streak tracking.
  • Google AdMob integration (interstitial and rewarded).
  • Game Center leaderboards.
  • Retro UI theme refresh.

item.title: v1.0 — Initial Release
item.dc:creator: Ziyad Alsuhaymi
item.description:
Color Number Match launches on the App Store.

  • 2000+ puzzle levels across 10 packs.
  • Match by color, number, or both.
  • Coin economy and power-ups.
  • In-app purchases (ad removal, coin packs, unlimited lives).
  • Launch with 7 languages: English, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese.
